inputs.prompt: Create a workflow with a manual trigger that makes an HTTP GET request to https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1 and returns the JSON response.

context.dos:
Use the n8n-nodes-base.manualTrigger node as the entry point
Use the n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest node for the outbound call
Configure the HTTP Request node with the URL specified in the prompt
context.donts:
Do not add any credentials to the HTTP Request node since the endpoint is public
Do not add a Code node for anything that can be expressed with built-in nodes

inputs.prompt: Create a workflow that receives a webhook and forwards the body to Slack channel #alerts.

context.dos:
Use the n8n-nodes-base.webhook node as the entry point
Use the Slack node to post the message
Use the channel #alerts
context.donts:
Do not hardcode a Slack token in parameters (credentials should be referenced instead)
Do not add an HTTP Request node when a dedicated Slack node is available
